system_issue.description: Task assignment system continues to assign completed task despite 26+ previous completion reports
system_issue.recommendation: Investigate database update mechanism and task queue filtering

note: Task #8804 was already completed by previous agents. File exists, is properly configured for Vite, builds successfully, and is committed to repository. This is the 27th duplicate assignment. No changes made. CRITICAL: Task assignment system failure detected - 27 agents have now verified this task is complete.
recommendation: URGENT: Mark task #8804 as COMPLETED in database and remove from assignment queue to prevent 28th assignment. Review why database status updates from 26 previous agents were not processed.
